prompt: Pure white (#FFFFFF) monochrome minimal line icon, flat, matching the reference icons' style. Centered symbol: one complete square document outline (rounded square, equal width and height, with folded top-right corner) with a lightning bolt inside it, suggesting fast file viewing. The document must be square, not a tall page. The full outline must be visible and the bolt fully contained within it. Bold rounded strokes, pure white only, no dark colors, generous padding, symbol fills about 70% of the frame, vertically and horizontally centered, square composition. Transparent background. No other text.
